argv: import json,subprocess,pathlib; a=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--name-only','--diff-filter=ACMR','origin/main...HEAD'],text=True).splitlines(); b=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--name-only','--diff-filter=ACMR'],text=True).splitlines(); p=list(dict.fromkeys(a+b)); j=[x for x in p if x.endswith('.json')]; [json.loads(pathlib.Path(x).read_text()) for x in j]; print(f'json_files={len(j)} status=passed')
